name: Deep Dark
description: A sleek, modern dark theme with deep blacks and subtle gray surfaces. Perfect for developer tools, dashboards, and night-mode interfaces. Minimizes eye strain with high-contrast text on dark backgrounds.
author: System

referenceTokens.--surface-hierarchy: 3-level dark: base (#030712), surface (#111827), raised (#1F2937). Light base uses #F3F4F6
referenceTokens.--intended-usage: Developer tools, admin panels, dark-mode-first apps
referenceTokens.--text-approach: Light text on dark, avoid pure white, use gray-100 for body
